columns.name: event_id
columns.description: Unique event identifier for the page view; used as deduplication key within 10-minute sliding window

columns.name: session_id
columns.description: Session identifier linking the page view to a session in stg_sessions

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Authenticated user identifier; null for anonymous users

columns.name: anonymous_id
columns.description: Anonymous user identifier based on cookie or device fingerprint

columns.name: page_url
columns.description: Full URL of the viewed page

columns.name: page_title
columns.description: HTML title of the viewed page

columns.name: referrer_url
columns.description: Full URL of the referring page

columns.name: utm_source
columns.description: UTM source campaign parameter

columns.name: utm_medium
columns.description: UTM medium campaign parameter

columns.name: utm_campaign
columns.description: UTM campaign name parameter

columns.name: device_type
columns.description: Device type (mobile, desktop, tablet); used as clustering column

columns.name: browser
columns.description: Browser name

columns.name: os
columns.description: Operating system name

columns.name: country_code
columns.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code; used as clustering column

columns.name: event_timestamp
columns.description: Timestamp when the page view event occurred; DAY partition column; must be within plus-or-minus 5 minutes of wall clock time

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the event was written to the source Kafka topic

columns.name: event_id
columns.description: Unique event identifier; used as deduplication key within 10-minute sliding window

columns.name: session_id
columns.description: Session identifier linking the event to a session in stg_sessions

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Authenticated user identifier; null for anonymous users

columns.name: anonymous_id
columns.description: Anonymous user identifier

columns.name: event_type
columns.description: Type of user interaction event (click, scroll, form_submit, etc.); used as clustering column

columns.name: event_category
columns.description: High-level category grouping for the event

columns.name: event_label
columns.description: Descriptive label for the event

columns.name: page_url
columns.description: URL of the page where the event occurred

columns.name: element_id
columns.description: DOM element identifier that triggered the event

columns.name: event_value
columns.description: Numeric value associated with the event (e.g. scroll depth, monetary value)

columns.name: properties
columns.description: JSON-encoded string of additional arbitrary event properties

columns.name: device_type
columns.description: Device type (mobile, desktop, tablet); used as clustering column

columns.name: event_timestamp
columns.description: Timestamp when the user event occurred; DAY partition column; must be within plus-or-minus 5 minutes of wall clock time

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the event was written to the source Kafka topic

columns.name: session_id
columns.description: Unique session identifier

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Authenticated user identifier; null for anonymous sessions; used as clustering column

columns.name: anonymous_id
columns.description: Anonymous user identifier

columns.name: session_start
columns.description: Timestamp when the session started; DAY partition column

columns.name: session_end
columns.description: Timestamp when the session ended; null for active or incomplete sessions

columns.name: duration_seconds
columns.description: Total session duration in seconds

columns.name: page_view_count
columns.description: Number of page views recorded in the session

columns.name: event_count
columns.description: Total number of interaction events recorded in the session

columns.name: landing_page
columns.description: URL of the first page viewed in the session

columns.name: exit_page
columns.description: URL of the last page viewed in the session

columns.name: channel
columns.description: Acquisition channel (organic, paid, direct, referral, email, etc.); used as clustering column

columns.name: country_code
columns.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the session; used as clustering column

columns.name: device_type
columns.description: Device type (mobile, desktop, tablet); used as clustering column

columns.name: is_bounce
columns.description: True if the session consisted of a single page view with no further interaction

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the session record was written to the source Kafka topic

cardinality.notes: One session generates many page view events; session_id in stg_page_views is a non-enforced foreign key to stg_sessions.session_id; page_view_count in stg_sessions reflects this cardinality
One session generates many user interaction events; session_id in stg_user_events is a non-enforced foreign key to stg_sessions.session_id; event_count in stg_sessions reflects this cardinality
